flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Community Care College fell 83% between 2006 and 2009 (100.0% → 16.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Community Care College fell 55% between 2006 and 2009 (634 → 286).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community Care College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Community Care College fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.2k → $8.9k).
